name: deadends-dev
title: deadends.dev
description: Structured failure knowledge for AI agents — dead ends, workarounds, error chains. 1028 error entries across 20 domains.

tools.name: lookup_error
tools.description: Match an error message against 1028 known patterns. Returns dead ends, workarounds, and error chains.

tools.name: get_error_detail
tools.description: Get full details for a specific error by ID (e.g., python/modulenotfounderror/py311-linux).

tools.name: list_error_domains
tools.description: List all 20 error domains and their counts.

tools.name: search_errors
tools.description: Fuzzy keyword search across all domains.

tools.name: list_errors_by_domain
tools.description: List all errors in a specific domain, sorted by fix rate, name, or confidence.

tools.name: batch_lookup
tools.description: Look up multiple error messages at once (max 10).

tools.name: get_domain_stats
tools.description: Get quality metrics for a domain: avg fix rate, resolvability, confidence breakdown.

tools.name: get_error_chain
tools.description: Traverse the error transition graph: what errors follow, precede, or get confused with this one.
